name: Cheer up a Crab
recipeIngredient: 2 packages frozen spinach, cooked and well drained
1 can (10 ounces) Rotel tomatoes with green chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cooked and drained spinach in a greased shallow 2-quart casserole dish.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the Rotel tomatoes with green chiles, sour cream, grated cheese, crabmeat, nutmeg, Mrs. Dash, dill weed, and chopped onion.
3. Pour the mixture over the spinach in the casserole dish.
4. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
